channel.title: Graphql Bookstore on 0xWizard
channel.description: Recent content in Graphql Bookstore on 0xWizard

item.title: Breaking The Graphql Bookstore API
item.description:
Introduction

Hello, welcome back to my blog. In this writeup, I’ll walk you through how I was able to break the GraphQL Bookstore API developed by Ipsalmy, one of my mentors in this field.

You can find the lab here: https://api.graphqlbook.org/ and the Github Repository too here: https://github.com/DghostNinja/graphql-bookstore-API.

Don’t forget to star the GitHub repository to encourage him to create more awesome labs for the community. A special thanks also goes to HAWD for equipping me with practical API security skills through their intensive 12-week API program. That experience helped me approach this lab with the mindset of an attacker instead of just a tester. Now, enough with the warm-up. Let’s dive into the bookstore and start breaking things xD.
